title: Submit job to printer
given: a job file
when: the operator submits the job file using Submission method
then: the printer appends a new controller job to the scheduled jobs AND the controller job is of type Job type

title: Complete printing moves job to printed
given: a controller job is in the scheduled jobs AND the controller job is a production job
when: the printer starts printing the controller job AND the printer completes printing the controller job
then: the controller job is in the printed jobs

title: Restart cleanup
given: the printer controller is running
when: the operator restarts the printer controller
then: the printed jobs clean up is executed

title: Pause printing
given: a controller job is printing
when: the operator pauses the printing of the controller job
then: the controller job is paused

title: Resume paused job
given: a controller job is paused
when: the operator resumes printing the controller job
then: the controller job is printing

title: Move paused job to waiting
given: a controller job is paused
when: the operator moves the controller job to the waiting jobs before the printer completes printing
then: the controller job is in the waiting jobs AND the controller job is not in the printed jobs

title: Move from waiting to scheduled
given: a controller job in the waiting jobs
when: the operator moves the controller job to the scheduled jobs
then: the controller job is in the scheduled jobs

title: Hard copy output after printing
given: a controller job is in the scheduled jobs
when: the printer starts printing the controller job AND the printer completes printing the controller job
then: there is a printed output AND the printed output is a hard copy of the controller job

title: Add two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 5 and 7 and choose addition
then: the calculator displays the result as 12

title: Subtract two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 10 and 3 and choose subtraction
then: the calculator displays the result as 7

title: Multiply two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 4 and 6 and choose multiplication
then: the calculator displays the result as 24

title: Divide two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 20 and 4 and choose division
then: the calculator displays the result as 5

title: Add three numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 5 and add 3 and then add 2
then: the calculator displays the result as 10

title: Calculate percentage
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 80 and calculate 25 percent
then: the calculator displays the result as 20

title: Square a number
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 9 and choose square operation
then: the calculator displays the result as 81

title: Calculate square root
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 16 and choose square root operation
then: the calculator displays the result as 4

title: Chain operations add and multiply
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter 5 add 3 and then multiply by 2
then: the calculator displays the result as 16

title: Calculate average of two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 8 and 12 and choose average
then: the calculator displays the result as 10

title: Clear and add
given: the calculator displays 42
when: I clear the calculator and then enter 7 and add 3
then: the calculator displays the result as 10

title: Add negative numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers -5 and -3 and choose addition
then: the calculator displays the result as -8

title: Subtract with negative result
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 5 and 12 and choose subtraction
then: the calculator displays the result as -7

title: Add decimal numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 3.5 and 2.7 and choose addition
then: the calculator displays the result as 6.2

title: Multiply by zero
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 25 and 0 and choose multiplication
then: the calculator displays the result as 0

title: Cancel job during printing
given: a controller job is printing
when: the operator cancels the controller job
then: the controller job is removed from scheduled jobs AND the controller job is not in printed jobs AND the printer stops printing

title: Handle paper jam during production
given: a production job is printing AND the printer has sufficient paper
when: a paper jam occurs AND the operator clears the paper jam AND the operator resumes printing
then: the controller job continues printing from the last successful page

title: Priority job jumps queue
given: there are 3 jobs in the scheduled jobs
when: the operator submits a high priority job AND marks it as urgent
then: the high priority job is inserted at the beginning of scheduled jobs

title: Concurrent pause requests
given: a controller job is printing
when: two operators attempt to pause the same controller job simultaneously
then: the controller job is paused only once AND both operators receive confirmation

title: Auto-cleanup old printed jobs
given: there are 50 jobs in printed jobs AND printed jobs are older than 30 days
when: the scheduled cleanup task runs
then: jobs older than 30 days are removed from printed jobs AND recent jobs remain

title: Resume printing after power failure
given: a controller job is printing at page 45 of 100
when: a power failure occurs AND the printer restarts AND the operator resumes the controller job
then: the controller job continues printing from page 45

title: Duplicate job submission detection
given: a job file with checksum ABC123 is in scheduled jobs
when: the operator submits the same job file with checksum ABC123
then: the printer rejects the duplicate AND displays a warning message

title: Check ink level
given: a printer is online
when: the operator checks the ink level
then: the current ink level is displayed

title: Select paper tray
given: the printer has two paper trays loaded
when: the operator selects tray 2 for the next job
then: the active paper tray is set to tray 2

title: Enable duplex printing
given: the printer supports duplex mode
when: the operator enables duplex printing
then: the print mode is set to duplex

title: View printer status
given: the printer controller is running
when: the operator requests the printer status
then: the printer status information is displayed

title: Reorder jobs in queue
given: there are 3 jobs in the scheduled jobs AND job B is at position 2
when: the operator moves job B to position 1
then: job B is at position 1 AND the remaining jobs shift down by one position

title: Batch print with mixed settings
given: 3 controller jobs are in the scheduled jobs AND job A requires color printing AND job B requires grayscale AND job C requires color printing
when: the operator starts batch printing AND the printer processes each job with its individual settings
then: job A is printed in color AND job B is printed in grayscale AND job C is printed in color AND all jobs are moved to printed jobs

title: Print job with insufficient paper
given: a controller job requires 100 pages AND the printer has only 50 pages of paper remaining
when: the printer starts printing the controller job AND the paper runs out at page 50
then: the controller job is paused at page 50 AND the operator is notified of insufficient paper AND the job resumes after paper is refilled

title: Scheduled maintenance interrupts printing
given: a controller job is printing AND scheduled maintenance is due in 5 minutes
when: the maintenance timer expires AND the printer pauses all active jobs AND the operator completes maintenance AND the operator resumes printing
then: the controller job continues from the interrupted page AND the maintenance log is updated

title: Access control denies unauthorized cancel
given: a controller job belongs to operator A AND operator B does not have permission to manage it
when: operator B attempts to cancel the controller job
then: the cancel request is denied AND operator B receives an access denied notification AND the controller job continues printing

title: Division by zero handling
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 10 and 0 and choose division
then: the calculator displays an error AND the previous result is preserved

title: Memory store and recall
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 42 and store it in memory AND I clear the display AND I recall the value from memory
then: the calculator displays the result as 42

title: Convert result to percentage
given: the calculator displays 0.75
when: I choose the convert to percentage operation
then: the calculator displays the result as 75

title: Undo last operation
given: the calculator displays 15 after adding 5 and 10
when: I undo the last operation
then: the calculator displays the result as 5 AND the last operation is removed from history

title: Toggle sign of number
given: the calculator displays 25
when: I press the toggle sign button
then: the calculator displays the result as -25

title: Chain four operations
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter 100 and subtract 25 and then multiply by 4 and then add 10
then: the calculator displays the result as 310

title: Compound interest calculation
given: the calculator is in scientific mode
when: I enter the principal 1000 and the rate 5 percent and the period 3 years and choose compound interest calculation
then: the calculator computes the compound amount AND the result is greater than the principal AND the interest earned is displayed separately

title: Statistical mean of multiple values
given: the calculator is in statistics mode
when: I enter the values 10 and 20 and 30 and 40 and choose mean
then: the calculator displays the result as 25 AND the count of values is 4

title: Expression with nested operations
given: the calculator is in advanced mode
when: I enter 2 multiplied by the sum of 3 and 4 and then divide the result by 7
then: the calculator displays the result as 2

title: View product details
given: a product exists in the catalog
when: the user views the product page
then: the product details are displayed

title: Add item to wishlist
given: a user is logged in AND a product is available in the catalog
when: the user adds the product to the wishlist
then: the product is in the user wishlist

title: Remove item from cart
given: a product is in the shopping cart
when: the user removes the product from the cart
then: the product is not in the shopping cart AND the cart total is updated

title: Search for a product
given: the product catalog is loaded
when: the user searches for a product by name
then: the search results contain matching products

title: Log in to account
given: a user account exists with valid credentials
when: the user enters the credentials and submits the login form
then: the user is authenticated AND the session is active

title: Update shipping address
given: a user is logged in AND has a saved shipping address
when: the user updates the shipping address
then: the new shipping address is saved in the account

title: Log out of account
given: a user session is active
when: the user clicks the logout button
then: the session is terminated AND the user is redirected to the home page

title: Add product with stock check
given: a product is available with 10 items in stock
when: the user adds 3 units of the product to the cart
then: the cart contains 3 units of the product AND the reserved stock is updated to 7

title: Apply discount code
given: a shopping cart with total 100 AND a valid discount code for 20 percent off
when: the user applies the discount code at checkout
then: the cart total is reduced to 80 AND the discount code is marked as used

title: Return item within policy
given: an order was delivered 5 days ago AND the return policy allows returns within 30 days
when: the customer initiates a return for the item AND provides the reason
then: a return label is generated AND the item status is changed to return pending

title: Update quantity in cart
given: a product with 3 units is in the cart AND 10 items are in stock
when: the user changes the quantity to 5
then: the cart reflects 5 units of the product AND the reserved stock is updated

title: Apply loyalty points to order
given: a customer has 500 loyalty points AND the order total is 50
when: the customer applies 200 loyalty points to the order
then: the order total is reduced by the point value AND the loyalty balance is updated to 300

title: Filter products by price range
given: the product catalog contains products with various prices
when: the user sets a minimum price of 20 and a maximum price of 50 AND applies the filter
then: only products within the price range are displayed AND the result count is updated

title: Leave product review
given: a customer has purchased a product AND the order has been delivered
when: the customer submits a review with a rating of 4 stars and a comment
then: the review is added to the product page AND the average rating is recalculated

title: Subscribe to restock notification
given: a product is out of stock AND the user is logged in
when: the user subscribes to restock notifications for the product
then: the subscription is created AND the user is added to the notification list

title: Checkout with insufficient inventory
given: a product has 2 items in stock AND the user has 5 units in the cart
when: the user proceeds to checkout AND the system verifies inventory availability
then: the user is notified of insufficient stock AND the cart quantity is adjusted to 2 AND the order is not placed

title: Multi-step checkout process
given: a user is logged in AND the shopping cart has items AND a shipping address is saved
when: the user selects a payment method AND enters payment details AND confirms the order
then: the payment is processed AND the order is created AND the inventory is reduced AND a confirmation email is sent

title: Bundle discount calculation
given: a bundle offer requires 3 products from the same category AND a 15 percent bundle discount applies
when: the user adds 3 eligible products to the cart AND the system detects the bundle
then: the bundle discount is applied to the cart total AND each product shows the discounted price AND the savings amount is displayed

title: Cancel order after partial shipment
given: an order has 3 items AND 1 item has been shipped AND 2 items are pending shipment
when: the customer requests cancellation of the entire order
then: the shipped item remains in shipped status AND the pending items are cancelled AND a partial refund is initiated for the cancelled items AND the inventory is restored for cancelled items

title: Concurrent cart updates from two sessions
given: a user is logged in on two devices AND the cart contains a product with quantity 2
when: the user adds a new product on device one AND the user removes the existing product on device two
then: the cart contains only the new product AND the removed product is no longer in the cart AND the cart is synchronized across both sessions

title: Price match guarantee
given: a product is in the cart at price 100 AND a competitor offers the same product at price 80
when: the customer submits a price match request with competitor proof AND the system verifies the competitor price
then: the product price is adjusted to 80 AND the price difference is applied to the order AND the adjustment is logged

title: Gift card partial payment
given: an order total is 150 AND a gift card has a balance of 100
when: the user applies the gift card AND pays the remaining balance with a credit card
then: the gift card balance is reduced to 0 AND the credit card is charged 50 AND the order is confirmed AND both payment methods are recorded

title: Cart abandonment recovery
given: a user has items in the cart AND the cart has been inactive for 24 hours AND the user has email notifications enabled
when: the abandonment recovery system runs AND the system sends a reminder email to the user
then: the reminder email is sent with cart contents AND a discount incentive is included AND the cart is preserved for 7 more days

title: Flash sale with limited stock
given: a flash sale starts for a product with 5 units available AND 10 users are waiting to purchase
when: the flash sale begins AND multiple users attempt to add the product to their carts simultaneously
then: only the first 5 successful users have the product in their carts AND the remaining users are notified that the product is sold out AND the product is marked as unavailable

title: Check account balance
given: a bank account exists with balance 5000
when: the customer checks the account balance
then: the balance is displayed as 5000

title: Deposit money
given: a bank account has a balance of 1000
when: the customer deposits 500 into the account
then: the account balance is updated to 1500

title: Withdraw cash
given: a bank account has a balance of 3000
when: the customer withdraws 200
then: the account balance is updated to 2800 AND the cash is dispensed

title: View transaction history
given: a bank account has recorded transactions
when: the customer requests the transaction history
then: the list of transactions is displayed

title: Freeze debit card
given: a debit card is active
when: the customer freezes the debit card
then: the card status is set to frozen AND new transactions are blocked

title: Update contact phone number
given: a customer account exists with a registered phone number
when: the customer updates the phone number to a new number
then: the phone number is updated in the account records

title: Check credit score
given: a customer is enrolled in credit monitoring
when: the customer requests the credit score
then: the current credit score is displayed

title: Transfer between own accounts
given: a checking account with balance 3000 AND a savings account with balance 2000
when: the customer transfers 500 from the checking account to the savings account
then: the checking balance is 2500 AND the savings balance is 2500 AND the transfer is recorded

title: Pay bill with sufficient funds
given: a bank account with balance 1500 AND a pending electricity bill of 300
when: the customer pays the bill from the account
then: the account balance is 1200 AND the bill is marked as paid AND the payment is recorded in transaction history

title: Set up recurring payment
given: a bank account is active AND a payee is registered
when: the customer sets up a monthly payment of 100 to the payee starting on the 15th
then: the recurring payment is created AND the next payment date is set to the 15th

title: Request overdraft protection
given: a checking account without overdraft protection AND the customer meets eligibility criteria
when: the customer requests overdraft protection with a limit of 1000
then: overdraft protection is enabled AND the overdraft limit is set to 1000

title: Change daily withdrawal limit
given: an account with a daily withdrawal limit of 500
when: the customer requests to increase the daily limit to 1000 AND provides additional verification
then: the daily withdrawal limit is updated to 1000 AND the change is logged

title: Dispute a transaction
given: a bank account has a transaction of 150 that the customer does not recognize
when: the customer disputes the transaction AND provides the transaction ID
then: the transaction is flagged as disputed AND a temporary credit of 150 is applied AND an investigation case is opened

title: Open a fixed deposit
given: a savings account with balance 10000 AND the fixed deposit rate is 4 percent for 12 months
when: the customer opens a fixed deposit of 5000 for 12 months
then: the savings balance is reduced to 5000 AND the fixed deposit is created with maturity date in 12 months AND the interest rate is locked at 4 percent

title: Schedule a future transfer
given: a bank account with balance 5000 AND a beneficiary is registered
when: the customer schedules a transfer of 1000 to the beneficiary for next Monday
then: the scheduled transfer is created AND the funds are reserved AND the execution date is confirmed

title: International wire transfer with currency conversion
given: a bank account with balance 10000 in USD AND the transfer fee is 25 AND the exchange rate from USD to EUR is 0.85
when: the customer initiates a wire transfer of 1000 USD to a European account AND confirms the transfer
then: the account balance is reduced by 1025 AND the recipient receives 850 EUR AND the fee is deducted AND the transaction is recorded with the exchange rate

title: Loan payment with interest calculation
given: a loan with outstanding principal 10000 and annual interest rate 6 percent AND a monthly payment is due
when: the system calculates the monthly interest AND the customer makes a payment of 500
then: the interest portion is calculated as 50 AND the principal is reduced by 450 AND the customer account balance decreases by 500 AND the loan schedule is updated

title: Detect and block suspicious transaction
given: a customer account with normal spending patterns AND the fraud detection system is active
when: a transaction of 5000 from a foreign location is attempted AND the amount exceeds the typical spending by 400 percent
then: the transaction is blocked AND the customer is notified AND the card is temporarily frozen AND a fraud investigation case is opened

title: Joint account dual authorization
given: a joint account with two holders AND the account requires dual authorization for transfers above 5000
when: holder A initiates a transfer of 8000 AND holder B approves the transfer
then: the transfer is executed AND both approvals are recorded AND the account balance is updated

title: Account closure with balance transfer
given: account A has balance 3000 AND account B has balance 2000 AND both belong to the same customer
when: the customer requests to close account B and transfer its balance to account A
then: account A balance is updated to 5000 AND account B is closed AND all recurring payments from account B are cancelled AND the customer is notified

title: ATM withdrawal exceeds daily limit
given: a bank account with balance 5000 AND the daily withdrawal limit is 1000 AND 700 has already been withdrawn today
when: the customer attempts to withdraw 500 at the ATM
then: the withdrawal is declined AND the customer is informed that only 300 remains available today AND the account balance is unchanged

title: Chargeback processing
given: a customer purchased an item for 200 with a debit card AND the merchant did not deliver the item AND 30 days have passed
when: the customer files a chargeback request AND provides proof of non-delivery
then: the chargeback is initiated AND a temporary credit of 200 is applied to the account AND the merchant is notified AND a resolution deadline is set to 45 days

title: Multi-currency account conversion
given: a multi-currency account with USD balance 5000 and EUR balance 0 AND the exchange rate is 0.85 USD to EUR
when: the customer converts 1000 USD to EUR within the account
then: the USD balance is reduced to 4000 AND the EUR balance is updated to 850 AND the conversion is recorded with the exchange rate AND a confirmation is sent

title: Mortgage early repayment with penalty
given: a mortgage with outstanding balance 200000 AND the early repayment penalty is 2 percent of remaining balance AND the customer account has 210000
when: the customer requests full early repayment of the mortgage AND acknowledges the penalty
then: the penalty of 4000 is calculated AND the total payment of 204000 is deducted from the account AND the mortgage is closed AND the account balance is 6000

title: Search for a book
given: a book exists in the library catalog
when: the member searches for the book by title
then: the book information is displayed with availability status

title: Borrow a book
given: a book is available AND the member has no overdue books
when: the member borrows the book
then: the book is checked out to the member AND the due date is set

title: Return a book
given: a book is checked out to the member
when: the member returns the book
then: the book is marked as available

title: Renew membership
given: a library membership is about to expire
when: the member renews the membership
then: the membership expiration date is extended by one year

title: Reserve a study room
given: a study room is available at the requested time
when: the member reserves the study room for 2 hours
then: the room is reserved for the member AND the time slot is blocked

title: Cancel a book reservation
given: a book reservation exists for the member
when: the member cancels the reservation
then: the reservation is removed AND the book becomes available for others

title: Check membership status
given: a member has an active library membership
when: the member checks the membership status
then: the membership details are displayed including the expiration date

title: Place hold on borrowed book
given: a book is checked out to another member AND no holds exist on the book
when: the member places a hold on the book
then: the hold is created AND the member is added to the waiting list at position 1

title: Renew loan without holds
given: a book is checked out to the member AND the due date has not passed AND no other member has placed a hold on the book
when: the member renews the loan
then: the due date is extended by 14 days AND the renewal count is incremented

title: Return overdue book with fine
given: a book is checked out to the member AND the book is 5 days overdue AND the daily fine is 1
when: the member returns the book
then: the book is marked as available AND a fine of 5 is added to the member account

title: Transfer reservation to another member
given: a book reservation exists for member A AND member B is eligible to receive reservations
when: member A transfers the reservation to member B
then: the reservation is assigned to member B AND member A no longer has the reservation

title: Book room with equipment
given: a study room with a projector is available AND the member needs a projector for a presentation
when: the member reserves the room and requests the projector
then: the room is reserved AND the projector is allocated to the booking

title: Extend study room reservation
given: a member has a room reserved for 2 hours AND the room is available for the following hour
when: the member requests a 1 hour extension
then: the reservation is extended to 3 hours AND the additional time slot is blocked

title: Request interlibrary loan
given: a book is not available in the local catalog AND the book exists in a partner library catalog
when: the member requests an interlibrary loan for the book
then: the loan request is submitted to the partner library AND the estimated arrival date is set

title: Pay outstanding fines
given: a member has accumulated fines of 15 AND the member borrowing privileges are suspended
when: the member pays the outstanding fines
then: the fine balance is cleared AND borrowing privileges are restored

title: Batch return with mixed fines
given: a member has 3 books checked out AND book A is on time AND book B is 3 days overdue AND book C is 7 days overdue AND the daily fine is 1
when: the member returns all 3 books at once
then: all books are marked as available AND a total fine of 10 is applied AND the fine breakdown is 0 for book A and 3 for book B and 7 for book C

title: Faculty priority reservation
given: a popular book has 2 holds from students AND the library gives faculty priority over students
when: a faculty member places a hold on the book
then: the faculty hold is placed at position 1 AND the student holds move to positions 2 and 3

title: Automatic hold expiry and reassignment
given: a held book has been available for pickup for 3 days AND the hold expiry period is 3 days AND 2 other members are on the waiting list
when: the system runs the hold expiry check
then: the expired hold is removed AND the book is assigned to the next member on the waiting list AND the next member is notified AND the waiting list positions are updated

title: Room booking conflict resolution
given: a study room is reserved by member A from 10 to 12 AND member B requests the same room from 11 to 13
when: member B submits the reservation request AND the system detects the time conflict
then: member B is notified of the conflict AND alternative available time slots are suggested AND the original reservation remains unchanged

title: Interlibrary loan with full tracking
given: an interlibrary loan request has been approved AND the book is at the partner library AND the member is eligible
when: the partner library ships the book AND the local library receives the book AND the member is notified
then: the book status is updated to available for pickup AND the loan period starts AND the return date is set AND the partner library records are updated

title: Concurrent borrow attempts
given: a single copy of a popular book has just been returned AND two members are waiting to borrow it
when: member A and member B both attempt to borrow the book at the same time
then: only one member successfully borrows the book AND the other member is offered to place a hold AND the book is checked out exactly once

title: Overdue renewal denied due to hold
given: a book is checked out to member A AND the book is 2 days overdue AND member B has placed a hold on the book
when: member A attempts to renew the book
then: the renewal is denied because of the existing hold AND member A is notified to return the book AND the overdue fine continues to accumulate

title: Semester-end bulk recall
given: the semester is ending in 7 days AND 50 books are checked out AND 20 of those books have holds from other members
when: the library initiates the semester-end recall process
then: recall notices are sent for the 20 books with holds AND the due dates for recalled books are shortened to 3 days AND non-recalled books retain their original due dates AND fines are doubled for recalled books not returned on time

title: Lost book replacement and account update
given: a book checked out to a member has been lost AND the book replacement cost is 45 AND the member has a clean borrowing record
when: the member reports the book as lost AND the system processes the lost book claim
then: the replacement fee of 45 is charged to the member account AND the book is removed from the member active loans AND the catalog is updated to reflect the lost copy AND a replacement order is placed if the book has active holds
